concept: Premium Automotive Tech - Minimal, precise, and high-performance. Inspired by modern EV interfaces.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#F5F5F7]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#F5F5F7]

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0B0B]/80 border-b border-[#1E2328] sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all
surfaces.card: bg-[#111315] border border-[#1E2328] transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#339DFF]/50 hover:-translate-y-1
surfaces.badge: bg-[#00FF9D]/10 text-[#00FF9D] border border-[#00FF9D]/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-medium

components.button_primary: bg-[#0A84FF] text-white hover:bg-[#339DFF] px-8 py-4 font-medium flex items-center justify-center transition-colors duration-200
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#F5F5F7] border border-[#1E2328] hover:bg-[#1A1D21] px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
components.input: bg-[#0B0B0B] border border-[#1E2328] text-[#F5F5F7] focus:border-[#0A84FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A84FF] transition-all

homepage.hero: 80vh min-height. Use 'hero_image' as background. OVERLAY: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0B0B0B] via-[#0B0B0B]/80 to-transparent. Content left-aligned. Massive H1.
homepage.featured_grid: Bento Grid Layout: 1 large dominant product (col-span-full md:col-span-8), 2 smaller products (col-span-4).

product_listing.layout: CSS Grid layout. Sidebar filters (col-span-1) on the left. Product grid (col-span-3) on the right.
product_listing.filters: Categories (Checkbox group), Price Range (Slider component from Shadcn).
product_listing.card_ui: Product image container with #0B0B0B bg, padding. Below image: Title, price, availability badge.

product_detail.layout: 2 Columns desktop (grid-cols-2). Left: Sticky product image with #111315 bg. Right: Scrolling content.
product_detail.content: Title, Price, Compatibility Pill, Description paragraph. Massive 'Add to Cart' primary button.

products.name: Wall Charger Pro
products.description: Smart home charging station with glowing LED indicator ring. Wi-Fi enabled for remote scheduling and monitoring.

products.name: Carbon Fiber Trunk Spoiler
products.description: Matte finish real carbon fiber spoiler. Enhances aerodynamics and provides a premium aggressive look.

products.name: Center Console Organizer
products.description: Minimalist matte black flocked tray to organize your essentials. Seamlessly integrates with the factory console.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-home', data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='filter-price-slider')

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Outfit' for headings and 'Inter' for body.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for layout composition, avoiding Shadcn generic layout wrappers. Use Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (Sliders, Checkboxes, Dialogs).
Never use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for large areas. Stick strictly to the defined color palette.
Use Lucide React for iconography. Maintain 1.5px stroke width for a premium technical look.
Hover states must be explicit. Use group-hover for card child elements.
